founder.heroTitle:
You have the idea.
You just need the 100 hands to build it.
founder.heroSub: CodyMaster gives non-technical founders the power to build, design, and deploy production-ready products — without writing a single line of code.

pains.title: Agencies drain your budget
pains.desc: You've been quoted $30K-50K for an MVP. Weeks of meetings. Revisions that cost extra. And the result? A product that doesn't match your vision.

pains.title: Ideas die waiting
pains.desc: By the time you find a developer, negotiate contracts, and start building — your competitor already launched. Speed is everything in startup land.

pains.title: No-code hits a wall
pains.desc: Wix, Squarespace, Bubble — great for static pages, terrible for real products. You need auth, dashboards, APIs, databases. No-code can't do that.

pains.title: You can't validate fast enough
pains.desc: Every day without a live product is a day you're guessing instead of learning. You need to test the market NOW, not in 3 months.

founder.solutionTitle: Your AI co-founder that never sleeps

solutions.benefit: Describe your idea in plain English. AI breaks it into an actionable plan.
Get a professional design system — 48 UX Laws, 1032+ patterns.
AI writes production code with tests. Not prototypes — real products.
One command to deploy. 8-gate pipeline. Automatic rollback if anything breaks.

after: You describe, AI builds exactly that

objections.q: Can AI really build production-quality products?
objections.a: Yes. Unlike ChatGPT copy-paste, CodyMaster enforces TDD, quality gates, and security scans. Every line of code is tested before deploy.

objections.q: I literally don't know any code. Will this work for me?
objections.a: That's exactly who this is for. The creator of CodyMaster is a PM who can't code either. You chat naturally — AI handles everything.

objections.q: What if I need changes later?
objections.a: Chat again. Tell AI what to change. It remembers context (cm-continuity) and updates without breaking existing functionality.

founder.ctaTitle:
Your idea deserves to exist.
Stop waiting. Start building.
founder.ctaSub: Free. No credit card. From idea to live product today.

guide.title: Build like the top 1% of tech startups, without the $100K budget.
guide.desc: You don't need a CTO to build a revolutionary product anymore. CodyMaster equips you with autonomous AI agents trained on Senior Engineer standards. You provide the vision; the agents write the code, run the tests, and secure the deployment.

plan.title: Instruct
plan.desc: Chat with the cm-planning agent in plain English. Describe your market, your users, and your dream app.

plan.title: Review
plan.desc: Watch the UI generate in real-time. Give feedback on colors, layout, and copy just like talking to a human designer.

plan.title: Deploy
plan.desc: Approve the code. The cm-safe-deploy agent runs 8 security gates and puts your app live on a global CDN instantly.

founder.failureTitle: Every day without a product is a day someone else takes your market share.
founder.failureDesc: If you spend the next 6 months trying to fundraise to hire an agency, you will lose the timing advantage. Stop hoping for a technical co-founder to fall from the sky.
founder.heroBadge: Built by a PM with 10+ years · Free & Open Source
fomo: 100% Free — no paywall, no credit card
Gets smarter every day you use it

costCallout.label: Average agency MVP cost. With CodyMaster: $0.

founder.failureWhile: ⏱️ While you're reading this, 3 other founders with the same idea are already building with AI.

cmo.heroTitle:
Your content team can't keep up.
CodyMaster can.
cmo.heroSub: Generate SEO-optimized content, high-converting landing pages, and complete ad tracking setup — all powered by StoryBrand, Cialdini, and 7 proven frameworks.
cmo.painTitle: Marketing at scale is broken without the right tools

pains.title: Content creation is too slow
pains.desc: Your writers produce 2 blog posts a week. You need 10. SEO specialists cost $5K/month. You're always behind the editorial calendar.

pains.title: Landing pages take forever
pains.desc: Every campaign needs a landing page. Designer → developer → QA → deploy. 2-3 weeks minimum. By then the campaign window has closed.

pains.title: Can't prove ROI to the board
pains.desc: Facebook Pixel partially set up. Google Ads conversion tracking missing. UTM parameters are inconsistent. You're flying blind on ROAS.

pains.title: Content doesn't convert
pains.desc: Your content looks good but doesn't drive action. No persuasion framework. No CRO optimization. No A/B testing hooks. Just words on a page.

solutions.benefit: StoryBrand + Cialdini + SUCCESs + STEPPS. AI writes content that converts, not just fills pages.
Landing pages with CRO built in — hero sections, social proof, objection handling, urgency.
Complete tracking: Meta Pixel + CAPI, TikTok Events, Google Ads Enhanced Conversions, UTM attribution.
Turn any content into audio. TTS reading mode increases engagement and time-on-page.

objections.q: Will AI content get penalized by Google?
objections.a: No. cm-content-factory generates original, SEO-optimized content with proper heading hierarchy, internal linking, and schema markup. It's not generic AI slop.

objections.q: Can it match our brand voice?
objections.a: Yes. Phase 0 asks about your brand, tone, style. It learns your voice and applies it consistently across all content.

objections.q: We use complex multi-touch attribution. Can it handle that?
objections.a: cm-ads-tracker sets up first-touch and last-touch attribution, cross-channel deduplication, and UTM conventions. Enterprise-grade tracking.

cmo.ctaTitle:
Stop being the bottleneck.
Start being the growth engine.
cmo.ctaSub: From content strategy to live campaigns — in minutes, not months.

guide.title: Scale your output without scaling your headcount.
guide.desc: Marketing at scale used to require massive teams of writers, designers, and developers. Now, CodyMaster's Content Factory acts as your elite, autonomous marketing department—producing SEO articles, landing pages, and tracking setups perfectly aligned with Cialdini's principles.

cmo.planTitle: From strategy to live campaign in hours

plan.title: Define
plan.desc: Tell the cm-content-factory your target audience, value proposition, and campaign goals.

plan.title: Generate
plan.desc: AI writes the copy using StoryBrand frameworks, while cm-ux-master generates the high-converting UI.

plan.title: Track
plan.desc: With cm-ads-tracker, automatically instrument Facebook Pixel, CAPI, and Google Ads before the page even goes live.

cmo.failureTitle: A marketing team that moves slow becomes irrelevant.
cmo.failureDesc: While you wait 3 weeks for your dev team to build one landing page, your competitors are running 10 different A/B tests. Speed of execution is the only modern marketing advantage.
cmo.heroBadge: 7 Persuasion Frameworks · Full Pixel Tracking · Free
fomo: Marketing teams scaling output 10x right now
Complete ad tracking: Meta, TikTok, Google

costCallout.label: Wasted on manual content and landing page workflows. Automated with CodyMaster.

cmo.failureWhile: ⏱️ Your competitor just launched 3 A/B test variants while you're still waiting for the dev team.

pm.heroTitle:
AI gave you 100 hands.
But without discipline, those hands create chaos.
pm.heroSub: CodyMaster is the control system for AI-powered product development. Enforced quality gates, design consistency, and auto-generated documentation.
pm.painLabel: THE CHAOS YOU KNOW TOO WELL

pains.title: Design is different every time
pains.desc: Same brand, same project, three different styles. AI forgets your design system between sessions. Stakeholders think it's three different products.

pains.title: AI breaks what already works
pains.desc: You ask AI to add a feature. It rewrites half the codebase. Working functionality disappears. You spend the next 2 days undoing the damage.

pains.title: No docs means no self-onboarding
pains.desc: Amazing product, zero documentation. Users flood support with basic questions. Your support team is drowning because nobody can self-serve.

pains.title: You can't see what AI is doing
pains.desc: Running 3 AI agents on 5 tasks. Which one is stuck? What deployed where? How many tokens were spent? You have zero visibility.

pm.solutionTitle: Discipline for AI. Peace of mind for you.

solutions.benefit: Design system enforced automatically. Same brand, same style, every single time.
6-gate quality system. Nothing reaches production without passing tests, linting, and security.
Auto-generate complete docs from code: API reference, SOPs, user guides, personas, JTBD.
Context persists across sessions. AI remembers mistakes and never repeats them.

objections.q: Won't quality gates slow things down?
objections.a: They save time. Catching a bug in the gate takes seconds. Catching it in production takes days. Net effect: you ship FASTER, not slower.

objections.q: I'm a PM, not a dev. Is this too technical?
objections.a: CodyMaster's creator is a PM too. Everything is designed for you to chat naturally. You say what you want, AI handles the technical details.

objections.q: We use Jira/Linear for task management. Does this replace them?
objections.a: No. CodyMaster complements your tools. It handles the AI execution part — the quality, consistency, and deployment that Jira can't enforce.

pm.ctaTitle:
You've managed chaos long enough.
Time for discipline.
pm.ctaSub: From AI chaos to production-ready products with enforced quality.

guide.title: Validate faster. Ship confidently. Prove ROI instantly.
guide.desc: Product management is about reducing risk. CodyMaster removes the engineering bottleneck entirely, allowing you to spin up functional prototypes and MVPs in hours to gather real user data before committing months of your actual tech team's time.

pm.planTitle: How to ship the right thing

plan.title: Scope
plan.desc: Use cm-planning to feed your PRDs into the AI. It instantly spots edge cases you might have missed.

plan.title: Prototype
plan.desc: Don't just show Figma files. Let CodyMaster build a live, clickable, coded prototype connected to a real database.

plan.title: Validate
plan.desc: Put it in front of users. Track their behavior. Then, hand off the validated specifications to your dev team (or just deploy it).

pm.failureTitle: Building features nobody wants burns your runway.
pm.failureDesc: 60% of features built by software teams are rarely or never used. If you can't test ideas rapidly, you are gambling your company's resources on unvalidated assumptions.
pm.heroBadge: Built by a Head of Product · 10+ Years Experience
fomo: The creator is a PM who can't code — this kit IS the solution
AI that remembers mistakes and never repeats them

costCallout.label: of features built by teams are rarely or never used. Validate faster with CodyMaster.

pm.failureWhile: ⏱️ While you're debating in meetings, undisciplined AI is breaking your codebase.

dev.heroTitle:
Stop writing setup code.
Start writing what matters.
dev.heroSub: For CTOs, Tech Leads, Frontend, Backend, Mobile devs, and QC engineers — CodyMaster handles the 80% of boilerplate while enforcing the quality standards you actually want.

pains.title: Setup déjà vu
pains.desc: Every. Single. Project. Git init, CI/CD config, test infra, linting, i18n, design tokens, deploy pipeline. You've done this 100 times. It never gets faster.

pains.title: AI code = zero test coverage
pains.desc: AI generates code fast. But no tests, no type safety, no error handling. You either rewrite it or ship and pray. Neither option is great.

pains.title: Deploy with fingers crossed
pains.desc: No staging environment. No rollback strategy. No quality gates. You push to main and check if production is still alive. Every time.

pains.title: Architecture decisions without context
pains.desc: AI doesn't understand your codebase's patterns. It generates code that conflicts with your architecture. You spend more time fixing than writing.

pains.title: QC has no automated safety net
pains.desc: QC engineers manually test everything. No automated test gates, no regression checks, no security scans built into the pipeline.

solutions.benefit: One command: design system, test infra, CI/CD, i18n, SEO, deploy pipeline. All wired up on day zero.
Tests are written BEFORE implementation. Every feature has coverage from the start.
8-gate pipeline: lint → type check → test → build → security → preview → deploy → verify. Auto-rollback on failure.
Full review lifecycle with technical rigor. Catches issues before they become production incidents.
For QC engineers: automated test gates, evidence-based verification, frontend safety checks. No deploy without passing.

before: 2-3 days to set up each project

objections.q: My stack is unusual. Will it work?
objections.a: CodyMaster supports 17 frameworks: React, Next.js, Astro, Vue, Nuxt, Svelte, SwiftUI, React Native, Flutter, Angular, htmx, Electron, Tauri, and more.

objections.q: I don't want AI writing my core logic.
objections.a: Then don't. Use CodyMaster for the 80% that's boring: scaffolding, tests, docs, deploy config. You write the 20% that requires your brain.

objections.q: How does this work for a CTO managing a team?
objections.a: As CTO, you define the quality standards once. CodyMaster enforces them across every project, every developer, every AI agent. Consistency at scale.

dev.ctaTitle:
Life is too short to write boilerplate.
Let AI do the boring parts. You do the brilliant parts.
dev.ctaSub: Free. Open source. Production-ready from day one.

guide.title: Stop writing boilerplate. Start architecting systems.
guide.desc: Senior engineers shouldn't be centering divs or writing basic CRUD endpoints. CodyMaster acts as your tireless junior developer, scaffolding apps, writing tests via cm-tdd, and executing repetitive tasks so you can focus on hard architectural problems.

plan.title: Scaffold
plan.desc: Use cm-project-bootstrap. Within 60 seconds you have a Vite/React app with routing, Tailwind v4, i18n, and testing pre-configured.

plan.title: Delegate
plan.desc: Assign complex logic to the cm-execution agent. It writes the code and the exhaustive unit tests simultaneously.

plan.title: Review
plan.desc: The code isn't a black box. You review the PRs. CodyMaster runs cm-quality-gate to catch regressions before you even look.

dev.failureTitle: Technical debt grows faster than you can hire.
dev.failureDesc: If your team is bogged down in legacy maintenance and slow manual testing, innovation stops. Without AI leverage, your top talent will burn out and leave for companies that move faster.
fomo: Senior devs are automating 80% of boilerplate
TDD-first: every feature has tests before code
Supports React, Vue, Next.js, Flutter, SwiftUI +12 more

costCallout.label: Wasted per project on setup boilerplate. With cm-project-bootstrap: 10 minutes.

dev.failureWhile: ⏱️ Tech debt grows faster than you can hire. Your best engineers are fixing bugs, not building features.

designer.heroTitle:
You designed the system.
AI should respect it.
designer.heroSub: CodyMaster is the only AI toolkit that reads your design tokens, previews before coding, and enforces brand consistency — making AI your design partner, not your design enemy.
designer.painTitle: AI should amplify your vision, not ignore it

pains.title: AI ignores your design tokens
pains.desc: You spent weeks defining your design system: colors, spacing, typography, components. AI doesn't read any of it. Every output looks random.

pains.title: No preview before coding
pains.desc: With code-first AI tools, you can't see the design until it's already built. By then, 80% of the code needs to change to match your vision.

pains.title: Inconsistent output kills brand
pains.desc: Page A uses rounded corners, Page B uses sharp edges, Page C has a completely different color palette. Same project. Same AI. Zero consistency.

pains.title: Dev handoff is broken
pains.desc: You design in Figma. AI codes from scratch, ignoring your meticulously crafted components. The gap between design and production is a canyon.

designer.solutionTitle: Preview → Approve → Code. In that order.

solutions.benefit: Harvester v4 reads your existing design system. 48 UX Laws validate every component. 1032+ patterns for inspiration.
See the UI before a single line of code is written. Powered by Google Stitch and Pencil.dev.
AI generates code that uses YOUR tokens, YOUR components, YOUR spacing. Not random defaults.
Design system is set up from day one. Every project starts with your brand DNA.

after: Design tokens are read and enforced

objections.q: I use Figma. Can it read my Figma tokens?
objections.a: Yes. cm-ux-master Harvester extracts design tokens from existing sites, CSS files, and design systems. Export from Figma, import into CodyMaster.

objections.q: Does 'AI preview' actually look like proper design?
objections.a: cm-ui-preview uses Google Stitch and Pencil.dev — professional design tools, not text mockups. You review real visual designs.

objections.q: I'm not technical. Can I still control the output?
objections.a: That's the entire point. You describe the design in natural language, preview it visually, and approve before any code is generated.

designer.ctaTitle:
Your design system deserves AI that listens.
Not AI that ignores.

guide.title: From Figma to React, skipping the translation loss.
guide.desc: The handoff is broken. You design something beautiful; development builds something that 'kind of' looks like it. CodyMaster bridges that gap, reading your design intent via cm-ux-master and generating pixel-perfect code that honors spacing, typography, and UX laws.

plan.title: Design
plan.desc: Create your concepts in Figma or directly instruct the cm-ui-preview skill with your visual requirements.

plan.title: Generate
plan.desc: CodyMaster translates your designs into clean Tailwind v4 utility classes and accessible DOM structures.

plan.title: Refine
plan.desc: Tweak animations, focus states, and responsive breakpoints directly in the code with plain English commands.

designer.failureTitle: Developers ruining your designs because handoffs are broken.
designer.failureDesc: If you don't control the implementation, your portfolio is full of 'what I designed' vs 'what they built'. Take back control of the final output.
designer.heroBadge: Harvester v4 · 48 UX Laws · Figma → Code Pipeline
fomo: Design-first AI that reads YOUR tokens
Preview in Google Stitch or Pencil.dev before any code
Extracts design systems from any existing website

costCallout.label: of AI-generated code doesn't match the design. cm-ux-master makes it pixel-perfect.

designer.failureWhile: ⏱️ Developers are shipping designs that don't match your vision. Again.

claw.heroTitle:
One skill kit.
Every AI agent in the family.
claw.heroSub: Whether you use Cursor, Claude Desktop, Antigravity, OpenClaw, NemoClaw, or OpenFang — CodyMaster's universal format means your skills work everywhere, instantly.
claw.painTitle: Tired of rewriting rules for every agent?

pains.title: Locked into one agent
pains.desc: You built custom prompts and rules for Cursor. Now you want to try Claude Desktop. Start from scratch. All your work? Doesn't transfer.

pains.title: Config files don't transfer
pains.desc: .cursorrules, claude_desktop_config.json, .windsurfrules — every agent has a different format. Your knowledge is fragmented across incompatible files.

pains.title: No universal skill format
pains.desc: You learned to write skills for one agent. But the Claw ecosystem (OpenClaw, NemoClaw, OpenFang) needs interoperability. No standard exists.

pains.title: Switching agents = starting over
pains.desc: A new, better agent launches. You want to try it. But migration means re-creating everything. Lock-in by configuration complexity.

claw.solutionTitle: Write once. Run anywhere. The Claw way.

solutions.benefit: A universal adapter that translates your skills into any agent's format. One SKILL.md, every agent reads it.
Meta-skill that knows your entire skill library. Ask which skill to use — it routes instantly.
Chain skills into automated pipelines. Works the same across Cursor, Claude, Antigravity, OpenClaw, and more.
Universal skill template. Create once, compatible with Antigravity, Claude, Cursor, OpenClaw, NemoClaw, and OpenFang.

objections.q: I only use Cursor. Do I need this?
objections.a: Yes! Even on Cursor alone, you get 34 battle-tested skills. And if you ever want to try Claude or Antigravity, your entire skill library comes with you.
It's the ecosystem of AI agent tools that share the Open Claw interop philosophy: OpenClaw, NemoClaw, OpenFang, and others. CodyMaster speaks their language natively.

objections.q: Can I create my own skills in this format?
objections.a: Absolutely. cm-skill-mastery guides you through creating custom skills that work across ALL Claw-compatible agents instantly.

claw.ctaTitle:
Join the universal skill ecosystem.
Write once. Run everywhere.
claw.ctaSub: 34 skills. Every Claw agent. Zero lock-in.

guide.title: The ultimate edge for independent creators and builders.
guide.desc: The Claw Family builds differently. You don't ask for permission. You identify niches, build tools, and generate revenue. CodyMaster is the ultimate multi-tool designed explicitly for indie hackers who need to move at warp speed.

plan.title: Spot
plan.desc: Identify a pain point. Use cm-brainstorm-idea to systematically break down the market opportunity and technical feasibility.

plan.title: Build
plan.desc: Deploy the full cm-execution pipeline. Generate the SaaS, attach Auth, and wire up Stripe in a single evening.

plan.title: Monetize
plan.desc: Use cm-ads-tracker to set up your conversion funnels, launch the ads, and watch the MRR grow.

claw.failureTitle: Working a 9-to-5 while your side-hustle gathers dust.
claw.failureDesc: You have 10 domains registered and 0 products launched. The longer you take to build, the more likely you are to lose motivation. Speed is life.
claw.heroBadge: Universal Format · Every AI Agent · Zero Lock-in
fomo: One SKILL.md works on Claude, Cursor, Gemini, and more
Switch AI agents freely — zero migration cost

costCallout.label: of your existing prompts and rules are locked to one agent. CodyMaster gives you freedom.

claw.failureWhile: ⏱️ A better AI agent launches tomorrow. Without CodyMaster, you start from scratch. Again.
